title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Breach Candy Hospital

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Breach Candy Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
